violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. PIC disposed of the ice. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

Hot dogs and hamburgers was observed held between 56-60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep units and shelf under prep tables have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The following was observed in poor repair. - ceiling tiles (previous water damage) - wall (hole) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
